invariant: surface, evidence and semantic registries are checked deterministically and do not mutate governance policy

INV-SEM-001.description: Reference-class semantic objects remain non-authoritative and non-executable.

INV-SEM-002.description: Replay and recovery references are non-executable and cannot enter runtime paths.

INV-SURF-001.description: Semantic evidence files must be surfaced by deterministic release evidence mapping.

INV-INC-001.description: Incident lifecycle state transitions are forward-only and append-only.
